addresses_denial_rationale.description: Hard gate: engages and rebuts each specific denial reason (anchor 5 required). Not weighted.

cites_clinical_evidence.description: Cites concrete patient-specific clinical facts in the appeal letter — not promises to attach records later.

cites_applicable_authority.description: Hard gate (conditional): PASS if no authority cited in letter, or every named authority is real, fair, and applicable. Does not require citations. Not weighted.

cites_binding_policy.description: When policy/regulation is invoked in the letter, it is accurately applied to this case (not generic padding). No invocation = neutral, not a penalty.

rebuts_specific_flaw.description: Hard gate: factually rebuts every distinct denial hook with case-specific facts (anchor 5 required). Not weighted.

medical_director_persuasion.description: Hard gate: clinical argument would convince a skeptical medical director to overturn (anchor 5 required). Not weighted.
